name: French Vegetable Au Gratin

ingredients.item: Half cup of mixed vegetable slices
Half cup of cream of tartar
One cup of shredded gruyere cheese

method: Heat it over medium high heat.
Heat it until it turns golden caramel.
Add the vegetable slices, cinnamon, cloves and nutmeg.
Increase the heat and cook it for five minutes.
Remove it from the heat and let it cool.
Take a large bowl and add cheese into it.
Add the cream of tartar and flour into it.
Add the cooked vegetables and rest of the ingredients into the
Add the ingredients into a baking dish.
Bake the ingredients for ten to fifteen minutes.
Your dish is ready to be served.
